name: Jellio++
description:
This plugin provides integration between Jellyfin and the Jellio++ service.
Fork of InfiniteAvenger/jellio-plus, updated for Jellyfin 12.0.0-rc1.

versions.changelog:
Jellio++ compatibility build for Jellyfin 12.0.0-rc1.

Changes:
- Retargets the plugin and tests to .NET 10.
- Updates Jellyfin.Controller and Jellyfin.Model references to 12.0.0-rc1.
- Fixes catalog, stream, and series metadata DTO generation for Jellyfin 12's updated IDtoService.GetBaseItemDtos signature.
- Updates plugin repository metadata to target ABI 12.0.0.0.

Use this release only for Jellyfin 12 RC servers. Jellyfin 10.11 users should stay on the 1.5.x line.

## What's Changed

- **Stream URLs now respect `PublicBaseUrl`**: fixes streams when Jellyfin runs behind a reverse proxy. ([#1](https://github.com/wujekbogdan/jellio-plus/pull/1))
- **Stream `behaviorHints` with OpenSubtitles hash, filename, and file size**: external subtitle addons like OpenSubtitles now get accurate matches instead of falling back to title or IMDB ID. ([#2](https://github.com/wujekbogdan/jellio-plus/pull/2))
- **Switched streaming to HLS**: fixes seeking and the progress bar, enables proper transcoding (passthrough where possible, partial or full only when needed), no more forced stereo downmix. ([#4](https://github.com/wujekbogdan/jellio-plus/pull/4))
- **Stremio addon version reads from the assembly**: was hardcoded to `0.0.1`, now stays in sync with the plugin version automatically. ([#3](https://github.com/wujekbogdan/jellio-plus/pull/3))
- **Rebranded to Jellio++**: `/jellio` routes are now `/jelliopp`, Stremio addon ID changed. Existing installs need to be reinstalled in Stremio. ([#5](https://github.com/wujekbogdan/jellio-plus/pull/5))

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wujekbogdan/jellio-plus/commits/v1.5.0
